Class AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub

java.lang.Object
io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub<AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub>
io.grpc.stub.AbstractBlockingStub<AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub
Enclosing class:
AutomationServiceGrpc
public static final class AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub extends io.grpc.stub.AbstractBlockingStub<AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub>
A stub to allow clients to do synchronous rpc calls to service AutomationService.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub
